title: Public Surface Sweeper forward delivery contract

claims.text: the forward delivery contract test suite passes
claims.falsification: python -m pytest -q returns a nonzero exit code or reports failing tests

claims.text: the bundled clean repository fixture reports ready with zero findings
claims.falsification: public-surface-sweeper examples/clean-repo --summary reports a non-ready status or nonzero findings

claims.text: the repository can self-audit its workspace delivery surface as MATCH
claims.falsification: workspace mode reports DRIFT, UNVERIFIABLE, absolute paths, raw secret values, network calls, or filesystem writes for this repository

claims.text: workspace mode produces bounded rollout counts for public and private-line workspaces
claims.falsification: workspace mode fails to return repository counts and MATCH/DRIFT/UNVERIFIABLE totals for C:/dev/public or C:/dev/opsec
